description: Registry defining the observation contract for all supported expectedSignal types.

urlChanged.description: Page URL must change after the step action completes.
urlChanged.failureMessage: Expected URL to change but it did not

urlChangedOptional.description: Page URL may or may not change. Observation is informational.

networkRequest.description: A network request matching urlContains is expected to be issued.

domChanged.description: DOM must change (MutationObserver detects childList/attributes/characterData change).
domChanged.failureMessage: Expected DOM to change but no mutation was observed

domChangedOptional.description: DOM may or may not change. Observation is informational.

scrollChanged.description: Page scroll position (window.scrollY) must change after the step.
scrollChanged.observationMethod: poll window.scrollY every 150ms until change or timeout

elementVisible.description: Target element becomes visible after the step.
